channel.title: GitHub Trending Changes
channel.description: Track changes in GitHub trending repositories

item.title: abhigyanpatwari / GitNexus
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 23,397 → 23,611 (+214) | Ranked #1
GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration
Language: TypeScript 857 stars today

item.title: google-ai-edge / gallery
item.description:
⭐ Stars: 17,841 → 17,982 (+141) | Ranked #2
A gallery that showcases on-device ML/GenAI use cases and allows people to try and use models locally.
Language: Kotlin 1,107 stars today

item.title: KeygraphHQ / shannon
item.description:
📈 Rank: #6 → #5 (↑1) | ⭐ Stars: 36,468 → 36,660 (+192)
Shannon Lite is an autonomous, white-box AI pentester for web applications and APIs. It analyzes your source code, identifies attack vectors, and executes real exploits to prove vulnerabilities before they reach production.
Language: TypeScript 733 stars today
